name: Programmatic 2D LIDAR Raycast Mapping
description: As an autonomy software engineer testing a SLAM mapping pipeline, programmatically generate a testing environment in CoppeliaSim using the ZMQ Remote API and extract a 2D point cloud. Construct a 6x6 meter enclosed room centered at the origin with four cuboid walls and at least three distinct obstacle shapes inside. Place a ray-type proximity sensor at (0, 0, 0.5) and perform a 360-degree sweep to collect distance data, converting valid hits to global Cartesian coordinates. Export the point cloud data to /home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/lidar_point_cloud.csv with headers angle_deg, distance_m, hit_x, and hit_y. Save a summary report including total_rays and valid_hits to /home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/mapping_report.json and save the generated scene to /home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/mapping_arena.ttt.
